choice-band.effect: Held: Increases Attack by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

choice-specs.effect: Held: Increases Special Attack by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

choice-scarf.effect: Held: Increases Speed by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

life-orb.effect: Held: Holder’s moves inflict 30% extra damage, but cost 10% max HP.

muscle-band.effect: Held: Boosts the damage of physical moves used by the holder by 10%.

wise-glasses.effect: Held: Boosts the damage of special moves used by the holder by 1/10 (10%).

black-belt.effect: Held: Fighting-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

black-glasses.effect: Held: Dark-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

charcoal.effect: Held: Fire-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

dragon-fang.effect: Held: Dragon-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

hard-stone.effect: Held: Rock-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

magnet.effect: Held: Electric-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

metal-coat.effect: Held: Steel-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

miracle-seed.effect: Held: Grass-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

mystic-water.effect: Held: Water-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

never-melt-ice.effect: Held: Ice-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

poison-barb.effect: Held: Poison-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

sharp-beak.effect: Held: Flying-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

silk-scarf.effect: Held: Normal-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

silver-powder.effect: Held: Bug-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

soft-sand.effect: Held: Ground-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

spell-tag.effect: Held: Ghost-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

twisted-spoon.effect: Held: Psychic-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

wave-incense.effect: Held: Water-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Breeding: Mantine begets a Mantyke Egg.

rock-incense.effect: Held: Rock-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Breeding: Sudowoodo begets a Bonsly Egg.

leftovers.effect: Held: Restores 1/16 (6.25%) holder’s max HP at the end of each turn.

black-sludge.effect: Held: Poison-type holder recovers 1/16 (6.25%) max HP each turn. Non-Poison-Types take 1/8 (12.5%) max HP damage.

rocky-helmet.effect: Held: When the holder is hit by a contact move, the attacking Pokémon takes 1/6 its max HP in damage.

assault-vest.effect: Raises the holder’s Special Defense to 1.5×.  Prevents the holder from selecting a status move.

eviolite.effect: Held: Holder has 1.5× Defense and Special Defense, as long as it’s not fully evolved.

focus-sash.effect: Held: Holder survives any single-hit attack at 1 HP if at max HP, then the item is consumed.

air-balloon.effect: Held: Grants immunity to Ground-type moves, Spikes, and Toxic Spikes. Consumed when the holder takes damage from a move.

shed-shell.effect: Held: Holder can bypass all trapping effects and switch out. Multi-turn moves still cannot be switched out of.

safety-goggles.effect: Held: Prevents damage from powder moves and the damage from Hail and Sandstorm.

flame-orb.effect: Held: Inflicts Burn on the holder at the end of the turn. Activates after Burn damage would occur.

toxic-orb.effect: Held: Inflicts Toxic on the holder at the end of the turn. Activates after Poison damage would occur.

iron-ball.effect: Held: Holder’s Speed is halved. Negates all Ground-type immunities, and makes Flying-types take neutral damage from Grou

lagging-tail.effect: Held: Holder moves last in its priority bracket.

sitrus-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to recover 1/4 max HP.

lum-berry.effect: Held: Consumed to cure any status condition or confusion.

chesto-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when asleep to cure sleep.

leppa-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when a move runs out of PP to restore its PP by 10.

oran-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to recover 10 HP.

pecha-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when poisoned to cure poison.

rawst-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when burned to cure a burn.

aspear-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when frozen to cure frozen.

cheri-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when paralyzed to cure paralysis.

persim-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when confused to cure confusion.

wiki-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike dry flavor.

mago-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike sweet flavor.

aguav-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike bitter flavor.

iapapa-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike sour flavor.

figy-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike spicy flavor.

salac-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Speed.

petaya-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Special Attack.

apicot-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Special Defense.

lansat-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost critical hit ratio by two stages.

starf-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost a random stat by two stages.

enigma-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective attack to restore 1/4 max HP.

micle-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost accuracy of next move by 20%. (Gen IV: Perfect accuracy)

custap-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP when using a move to go first.

jaboca-berry.effect: Held: Consumed to deal 1/8 attacker’s max HP when holder is struck by a physical attack.

rowap-berry.effect: Held: Consumed to deal 1/8 attacker’s max HP when holder is struck by a special attack.

kee-berry.effect: Held: When the holder is hit by a physical move, increases its Defense by one stage.

maranga-berry.effect: Held: When the holder is hit by a special move, increases its Special Defense by one stage.

liechi-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Attack.

ganlon-berry.effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Defense.

shuca-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Ground-type attack to halve the damage.

occa-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Fire-type attack to halve the damage.

passho-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Water-type attack to halve the damage.

wacan-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Electric-type attack to halve the damage.

rindo-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Grass-type attack to halve the damage.

yache-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Ice-type attack to halve the damage.

chople-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Fighting-type attack to halve the damage.

kebia-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Poison-type attack to halve the damage.

payapa-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Psychic-type attack to halve the damage.

tanga-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Bug-type attack to halve the damage.

charti-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Rock-type attack to halve the damage.

kasib-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Ghost-type attack to halve the damage.

haban-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Dragon-type attack to halve the damage.

colbur-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Dark-type attack to halve the damage.

babiri-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Steel-type attack to halve the damage.

chilan-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a Normal-type attack to halve the damage.

roseli-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Fairy-type attack to halve the damage.
